ddls:
CREATE TABLE "player_transfers" (
  "transfer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transfer entry */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "transfers_in_event" INTEGER /* Number of transfers in during the event */,
  "transfers_out_event" INTEGER /* Number of transfers out during the event */,
  "cost_change_event" INTEGER /* Cost change during the event */,
  "cost_change_start" INTEGER /* Cost change at the start of the event */,
  "transfer_date" TEXT /* Date of the transfer */,
  "transfer_type" TEXT /* Type of transfer (e.g., in, out) */,
  "transfer_fees" INTEGER /* Transfer fees */,
  "transfer_team_from" TEXT /* Team the player transferred from */,
  "transfer_team_to" TEXT /* Team the player transferred to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transfer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "team_code" TEXT /* Code of the team */,
  "stadium" TEXT /* Name of the stadium */,
  "manager" TEXT /* Name of the team manager */,
  "founded" TEXT /* Year the team was founded */,
  "home_kit" TEXT /* URL to the home kit image */,
  "away_kit" TEXT /* URL to the away kit image */,
  "team_value" INTEGER /* Total value of the team */,
  "team_strength" INTEGER /* Strength rating of the team */,
  "recent_form" TEXT /* Recent form summary */,
  "next_match_opponent" TEXT /* Name of the next match opponent */,
  "next_match_date" TEXT /* Date of the next match */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_data" (
  "game_data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game data entry */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "event_points" INTEGER /* Event points scored in the game */,
  "minutes" INTEGER /* Minutes played in the game */,
  "match_date" TEXT /* Date of the match */,
  "opponent_team" TEXT /* Name of the opponent team */,
  "stadium" TEXT /* Name of the stadium where the match was played */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the match (e.g., win, loss, draw) */,
  "goals_scored" INTEGER /* Number of goals scored in the match */,
  "assists" INTEGER /* Number of assists in the match */,
  "clean_sheets" INTEGER /* Number of clean sheets in the match */,
  "red_cards" INTEGER /* Number of red cards in the match */,
  "yellow_cards" INTEGER /* Number of yellow cards in the match */,
  "penalties_saved" INTEGER /* Number of penalties saved in the match */,
  "penalties_missed" INTEGER /* Number of penalties missed in the match */,
  "own_goals" INTEGER /* Number of own goals in the match */,
  "bonus" INTEGER /* Bonus points in the match */,
  "bps" INTEGER /* BPS points in the match */,
  "threat" REAL /* Threat rating in the match */,
  "influence" REAL /* Influence rating in the match */,
  "creativity" REAL /* Creativity rating in the match */,
  "ict_index" REAL /* ICT index in the match */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "news_and_updates" (
  "news_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each news entry */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player (if applicable) */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team (if applicable) */,
  "news_title" TEXT /* Title of the news */,
  "news_content" TEXT /* Content of the news */,
  "news_date" TEXT /* Date and time the news was published */,
  "news_source" TEXT /* Source of the news */,
  "impact" TEXT /* Impact of the news (e.g., positive, negative) */,
  "is_injury_report" INTEGER /* Indicates if the news is an injury report */,
  "injury_details" TEXT /* Details of the injury (if applicable) */,
  "return_date" TEXT /* Expected return date from injury (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("news_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_news_and_updates_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)
